items.title: Families search Syrian prison for long-detained relatives
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
Families scour the cells of Syria's Sednaya prison after its gates were flung open by rebels, searching for loved ones detained for attending protests, defying authorities or simply voicing discontent against former President Bashar al-Assad's regime.
 
#Reuters #news #Syria #BasharalAssad #military #militia #civilwar

items.title: Sectors Up Close: 'This is just the beginning' of demand for Bitcoin | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
It’s a merry Christmas for Bitcoin investors as prices near $100K. Ross Gerber of Gerber Kawasaki predicts they could double again, driven by institutional demand and crypto-friendly policies under the incoming Trump administration.

items.title: Ad giant Omnicom strikes $13 billion deal to buy Interpublic | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
Omnicom announced a $13 billion all-stock deal to acquire rival Interpublic Group, aiming to create the world's largest advertising agency and compete with Big Tech firms in the era of AI.

items.title: Syrians scour infamous Assad prison for signs of loved ones | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
Families desperately scoured the filthy cells of Syria's forbidding Sednaya prison for any sign of long-detained relatives after its gates were flung open by rebels, in hopes of finding missing loved ones.

items.title: ByteDance, TikTok seek temporary halt to US ban | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
China-based ByteDance and its short-video app TikTok asked an appeals court to temporarily block a law that would require that parent company ByteDance divest TikTok by Jan. 19 or face a ban, pending a review by the US Supreme Court.

items.title: UnitedHealth murder suspect in custody
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
New York City officials said the man suspected of killing UnitedHealth executive Brian Thompson in a brazen shooting outside a midtown Manhattan hotel last week has been arrested. The suspect, identified as Luigi Mangione, 26, was captured in Altoona, Pennsylvania, after he was spotted at a McDonald's.
 
#reuters #news #unitedhealth #unitedhealthcare #luigimangione

items.title: Ghana's former president Mahama wins election, officials say | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:

items.title: Google claims huge quantum computing advance | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
Google said that it has overcome a key challenge in quantum computing with a new generation of chip, solving a computing problem in five minutes that would take a classical computer more time than the history of the universe.

items.title: How the world could unplug from China’s batteries
items.author: Reuters
items.content: International cell makers are struggling  (https://www.reuters.com/breakingviews/chinas-global-battery-ram-will-be-hard-stop-2024-09-06/) to compete with Chinese giants like CATL (https://www.reuters.com/breakingviews/catl-earnings-slip-masks-charged-up-ambitions-2024-03-18/) . But innovations like solid-state batteries (https://www.reuters.com/breakingviews/ev-tariffs-are-only-first-step-eu-china-war-2024-10-04/)  could upend the industry in the not-too-distant future. In this week’s episode of The Big View podcast, QuantumScape CEO Siva Sivaram explains how.
